infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RunMate needs location to track your runs.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RunMate needs background location to track runs.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: RunMate uses motion sensors to detect cadence.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: RunMate reads your health data to import workouts.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: RunMate writes run data to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: RunMate saves route art images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RunMate accesses your photo library to save route art images.
